rationale: Review 1's two findings are accurate (the antipode_comp proof directly re-uses the WithConv + left_inv_eq_right_inv + Sweedler lemmas from Mathlib's Basic.antipode_mul, and the entire Map section is built on Bialgebra.TensorProduct.map/id/comp which is only imported via HopfAlgebra.TensorProduct). Acting on them produces meaningfully better attribution in the module docstring; Review 2's approve leaves the PR with demonstrably incomplete credit.
